---
name: Extension Request
about: Request support for a new manga/anime source
title: '[EXTENSION] '
labels: ['extension', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 📖 Source Information

### Source Details

- **Source Name**: [Name of the website/platform]
- **Source URL**: [URL of the website]
- **Content Type**:
  - [ ] Manga
  - [ ] Anime
  - [ ] Light Novel
  - [ ] Multiple types

### Source Features

- **Language**: [Primary language of content]
- **Content Volume**: [Estimated number of titles available]
- **Update Frequency**: [How often new content is added]
- **Quality**: [Content quality - High/Medium/Low]

## 🔍 Technical Details

### API Information

- **Public API Available**:
  - [ ] Yes - [API documentation URL]
  - [ ] No - Web scraping required
  - [ ] Unknown

### Website Structure

- **Search Functionality**:
  - [ ] Global search available
  - [ ] Category browsing
  - [ ] Advanced filters

- **Content Organization**:
  - [ ] Chapters/Episodes clearly organized
  - [ ] Multiple reading formats
  - [ ] Download options available

## 📋 Legal Considerations

### Copyright Status

- [ ] Source hosts original content
- [ ] Source has proper licensing
- [ ] Source allows third-party access
- [ ] Uncertain about legal status

**Note**: We only support sources that legally distribute content or have explicit permission for third-party access.

## 🎯 Use Case

### Why is this source important?

Describe why this source would be valuable to the Project Myriad community:

1. **Content Availability**: [Unique content not available elsewhere]
2. **Language Support**: [Language not well supported by other sources]
3. **Quality**: [High-quality content or better organization]
4. **Community Request**: [High demand from users]

### Expected Usage

- **Personal Use**: How you would use this source
- **Community Benefit**: How the community would benefit

## 🔧 Implementation Difficulty

### Technical Complexity

- [ ] Simple - Standard website structure
- [ ] Medium - Some anti-scraping measures
- [ ] Complex - Heavy JavaScript/SPA
- [ ] Very Complex - Advanced protection

### Development Estimate

If you're familiar with web development, estimate:

- **Time Required**: [Hours/Days/Weeks]
- **Special Requirements**: [Any special tools or techniques needed]

## 🤝 Contribution

### Are you willing to help implement this extension?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement it myself
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] Yes, I can provide technical details
- [ ] No, but I can test the extension

### Technical Skills

If you're willing to help, what skills do you have?

- [ ] JavaScript/Node.js
- [ ] Web scraping (Puppeteer, Cheerio)
- [ ] API integration
- [ ] Testing and QA

## 📸 Additional Information

### Screenshots

If possible, provide screenshots of:

- Search results page
- Content listing page
- Reader interface

### Example Content

Provide examples of content available on this source:

- Popular titles
- Recent additions
- Unique content

## ⚠️ Important Notes

- We prioritize sources that legally distribute content
- Sources with official APIs are preferred over web scraping
- Implementation timeline depends on complexity and legal clearance
- Community sources require ongoing maintenance

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have verified this source is not already supported
- [ ] I have confirmed the legal status of the content
- [ ] I have provided comprehensive source information
- [ ] I understand that illegal sources will not be supported
